title: Bitcoin is crashing.
head-text: Bitcoin prices fell below the $4,000 mark for the first time in a month.
text-1: Investors are jittery because Chinese regulators are threatening to crack down on some crypto-exchanges. Adding fuel to the fire is one of Wall Street's most influential leaders, Jamie Dimon Bear, who’s recently called the virtual currency concept a "fraud".
text-2: The crypto-market is in a state of confusion and Bitcoin is currently stuck in a downward trend. Turn this occasion into a trading opportunity by trading Bitcoin commission-free.
text-bold: Hurry: Starting September 19th, each Crypto-trading position will be charged a commission of up to 2.5% of its value. Only 5 days left!
